message:
fix: revert illegal useRef inside useEffect and restore missing imports

MemoryDump: The previous commit incorrectly moved `columns` and `drops`
from closure-scoped `let` variables to `useRef` calls placed inside the
useEffect callback. Hooks cannot be called inside callbacks — this
violated the Rules of Hooks and caused React error #321 ("Invalid hook
call") in production. Reverted to the original `let` variables which
are correct here: they are only mutated inside the effect closure
(animation frames and resize handlers), not during render.

feature-card.tsx: Restore missing `useMemo` import that was stripped
by the linter in a prior session, causing a build-time type error.

site-state.tsx: Restore missing `cn` import from utils (was dropped
when the `isTextInputLike` import was added in the earlier refactor).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
